## Ecclesiarchy Mercenaries

If your Warband is not Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Ministorum, or Inquisition, you can recruit only a maximum of 2 of these mercenaries.

#### 0-2 Arco-Flagellant (Cost: 3 Glory)

An Adeptus Mechanicus or Necromunda Gang (Ironhead Squat Prospectors) Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Arco-Flagellant | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Arco-Flagellant is equipped with two Arco-Flails. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Arco-Flails.** Melee, IGNORE OFF-HAND, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, STUN

**Abilities**

* **Penance Paid.** When the Arco-Flagellant is taken Out of Action, you can give any one of your other models 1 BLESSING MARKER. When the Arco-Flagellant becomes a casualty, you earn 1 Glory.  
* **Stimm Injectors.** When an Arco-Flagellant charges, roll 2D6 instead of 1D6 and then add the highest of the two dice to its charge move. In addition, Injury rolls made against the Arco-Flagellant have \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY, NEGATE FEAR, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Death Cult Assassin (Cost: 4 Glory)

An Adeptus Mechanicus, Adeptus Ministorum, or Necromunda Gang (Ironhead Squat Prospectors) Warband cannot take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Death Cult Assassin | 8”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Death Cult Assassin is equipped with Standard Armour, a Dartmask, a Power Weapon, a Blade, a Grapnel Launcher, and Sindexterous Cyberteknika. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Dartmask.** 6”, IGNORE LONG RANGE, GAS, ASSAULT  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL  
* **Grapnel Launcher.** A model with this launcher adds \+1 DICE to any Climb Success Roll rolls.  
* **Sindexterous Cyberteknika.** The model ignores the penalty for attack with its off-hand. In addition, the model ignores the penalties of the following Traumas (but not the accompanying Scar) and cannot gain them: Hand Wound, Lost Arm.

**Abilities**

* **Bladed Stance.** When an enemy Charges the Death Cult Assassin, if the Death Cult Assassin has not Activated this Turn, it can immediately take the Fight Action against that enemy before it takes any further actions. This can be done only once per Turn, and the Death Cult Assassin counts as having already taken the Fight Action during its Activation this Turn.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY, INFILTRATOR, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Dialogus (Cost: 4 Glory)

Only an Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Ministorum (Ecclesiastic Militant Force), or Inquisition (Ordo: Hereticus) Warband can take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Dialogus | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 32-40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Dialogus is equipped with Power Armour, included in its statistics above, as well as a Bolt Pistol, and a Staff of Declamation. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bolt Pistol.** 12”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, PISTOL  
* **Staff of Decelmation.** Melee, STUN

**Abilities**

* **Endless Crusade.** Once per battle, the Dialogus can use this ability as an Action with no roll required. Once used, until the end of the current Turn, the Dialogus and each friendly SORORITAS model within 6” of it have \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Laud Hailer.** At any point during its Activation, the Dialogus can take a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE. If successful, all friendly models that are Down and within 6” of the Dialogus may immediately stand up at no penalty or cost.  
* **Stirring Rhetoric.** If you have the Miracles special rule, whenever you spend a Miracle on a Success Roll for the Dialogus or an ally within 6” of it, you can set one die’s value to 6 before rolling instead of rolling it.  
    
  If you have the Battle Hymns special rule, the range of that rule is 9” instead of 6” for the Dialogus.  
    
  If you have the Vows of Atonement special rule, Injury roll made against your Repentia, Arco-Flagellants, and Penitent Engines within 9” of the Dialogus have \-1 INJURY DICE.

**Keywords**  
ORATOR, SORORITAS

#### 0-1 Hospitaller (Cost: 3 Glory)

Only an Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Ministorum (Ecclesiastic Militant Force), or Inquisition (Ordo: Hereticus) Warband can take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Hospitaler | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | \-2 | 32-50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Hospitaller is equipped with Power Armour, included in its statistics above, as well as a Bolt Pistol and Surgeon’s Tools. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bolt Pistol.** 12”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, PISTOL  
* **Surgeon’s Tools.** Melee, SHRAPNEL

**Abilities**

* **Medicus Ministorum.** As an Action with a Success Roll, the Hospitaller can heal itself or one friendly model within 1” of it. This Success Roll has \+1 DICE for every 2 BLOOD MARKERS on the target. On a success, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the target, or D3 BLOOD MARKERS on a Critical Success. You can choose to instead remove 3 BLOOD MARKERS if you spend 1 Miracle. You must choose before rolling the D3 on a Critical Success.  
    
  This Ability also automatically removes 3 BLOOD MARKERS if you have the Battle Hymns or the Vows of Atonement special rule and the Hospitaler is within 6” of a friendly ORATOR, Connoness, or Dogmata model, or within 9” of a friendly Dialogus.

**Keywords**  
SORORITAS

#### 0-1 Ministorum Priest (Cost: 4 Glory)

An Adeptus Mechanicus, Adeptus Ministorum, or Necromunda Gang (Ironhead Squat Prospectors) Warband cannot take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ministorum Priest | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Ministorum Priest is equipped with Standard Armour, a Stub Pistol, a Power Weapon, and a Rosarius. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Stub Pistol.** 12”, AUTOMATIC 2, \-1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Rosarius.** The Ministorum Priest treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).

**Abilities**

* **The Emperor Protects.** The first \-1 of armour of the Ministorum Priest and any friendly model within 6” of it has IMPERVIOUS, and \-DICE can always be applied to Injury rolls against it even if another rule would prevent this.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY, NEGATE FEAR, ORATOR

#### 0-1 Ministorum Vindictor (Cost: 4 Glory)

An Adeptus Mechanicus, Adeptus Ministorum, or Necromunda Gang (Ironhead Squat Prospectors) Warband cannot take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ministorum Vindictor | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Ministorum Vindictor is equipped with Standard Armour, a Zealot’s Vindictor, and a Rosarius. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Zealot’s Vindictor.** TWO-HANDED  
  * Chain Blade: Melee, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, CUMBERSOME  
  * Torch: 8”, ASSAULT, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE  
* **Rosarius.** The Ministorum Vindictor treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).

**Abilities**

* **The Emperor’s Strength.** Ministorum Vindictor and friendly models within 6” of it have ARMOUR PIERCING 1 with all of their melee attacks, stacking with other sources of ARMOUR PIERCING.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY, NEGATE FEAR, ORATOR

#### 0-1 Questkeeper (Cost: 3 Glory)

Only an Inquisition Warband can take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Questkeeper | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+2 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Questkeeper is equipped with an Auto Pistol and an Eviscerator. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Autopistol.** 12”, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Eviscerator.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, HEAVY, RISKY, SHRAPNEL

**Abilities**

* **Irrrepressable Purpose.** When the Questkeeper is taken Out of Action, before removing it from the table, it can make a single melee attack against an enemy it is in close combat with. BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on this attack's Success Roll.  
* **Warrior of Faith.** The Questkeeper can ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one melee weapon it wields. This does not allow it to carry more than one piece of HEAVY battlekit, and it must still use the normal number of hands.  
* **Zealous Purity.** Injury rolls made against the Questkeeper have \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY, NEGATE FEAR

#### 0-1 Saint Celestine (Cost: 8 Glory \+ 2 Glory to deploy)

Only an Adepta Sororitas Warband can take this mercenary. **You must pay 2 Glory to Deploy this model.**

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Saint Celestine | 8”/Flying | \+0 | \+3 | \-2 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
Saint Celestine is equipped with Armour of Saint Kathrine, The Ardent Blade, and 2 Geminae Superia. You cannot change her battlekit in any way.

* **Armour of Saint Kathrine.** \-2, IMPERVIOUS  
* **The Ardent Blade.** TWO-HANDED  
  * **Slash.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, CRITICAL, IGNORE ARMOUR on a Critical Hit  
  * **Smite.** 8”, FIRE, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR  
* **Geminae Superia.** Each Geminae adds \+1 INJURY DICE to all of Saint Celestine’s attacks.

**Abilities**

* **Healing Tears.** As an Action with a Success Roll with \+1 DICE, Saint Celestine can heal herself or one friendly model within 6” of her. On a success, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the target, or D3 BLOOD MARKERS on a Critical Success. You can choose to instead remove 3 BLOOD MARKERS if you spend 1 Miracle. You must choose before rolling the D3 on a Critical Success.  
    
  This Ability also automatically removes 3 BLOOD MARKERS if you have the Vows of Atonement special rule and Celestine is within 3” of a friendly ORATOR, Connoness, or Dogmata model.  
* **Lifewards.** Up to twice per battle, when Saint Celestine is taken Out of Action for any reason, treat the result as No Effect instead, but she loses 1 Giminae Superia each time.  
* **Living Saint.** Injuries rolled against Saint Celestine have \-1 DICE. In addition, she can never be a casualty.  
* **Miraculous Intervention.** Saint Celestine cannot be deployed normally, and cannot be deployed using her DEEP STRIKE keyword until the third Turn of the battle. In order to deploy her, you must pay 2 Glory.  
* **Saintly Blessings.** The first \-1 worth of Armour of other friendly SORORITAS models within 6” of Celestine have IMPERVIOUS, and those models have NEGATE FEAR.

**Keywords**  
DEEP STRIKE, FLYING, NEGATE FEAR, SORORITAS, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Salvationist (Cost: 2 Glory)

An Adeptus Mechanicus or Necromunda Gang (Ironhead Squat Prospectors) Warband cannot take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Salvationist | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+0 | \-1 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Salvationist is equipped with Standard Armour, a Soulstaff, and a Medicae Kit. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Soulstaff.** Melee  
* **Medicae Kit.** Models with a Medicae Kit can take a Risky Success Roll and choose themself or one ally within 1”. On a success, you can remove one BLOOD MARKER from the target, or if it is Down, you can instead allow it to stand up.

**Abilities**

* **Conversion Field.** The Salvationist and any ally within 6” of it treat Down Injury results as Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Healing Hands.** The Salvationist has \+1 DICE when using its Medicae Kit.

**Keywords**  
ECCLESIARCHY
